Cloud-native microservices APIs for Temenos Transact providing callback registry for long-running transactions, event store for business and system events, configuration management, user entitlements, service orchestration, application metering, and traceability for non-repudiation across all API services.

Contact Support:
 Name: Temenos Developer Support
 Email: api.support@temenos.com
